title: CobbleHelx Modpack (Cobblemon)
description: A Two Way created modpack revolving around Cobblemon built around exploration, building, and multiplayer gameplay. The pack combines Cobblemon with decoration mods, quality-of-life and our own CobbleHelx Relics to indulge you in the Helx universe.
body:
# CobbleHelx

![COBBLEHELX Title Graphic. It has blue hues along the letters with pink butterfly accents.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2ced94ddf952fa1d8d47ec1f20c3741bc78cfd5.png)
### Latest Modpack Version
1.2.2

Welcome to the Helx Universe.

**CobbleHelx** is a [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)-focused modpack built around exploration, building, and multiplayer gameplay. The pack combines Cobblemon with a carefully selected collection of decoration mods, quality-of-life improvements, optimisation mods, and custom Helx content from the [CobbleHelx Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblehelx-relics) mod) to create a more immersive experience without straying too far from vanilla-style progression.

Travel through large biomes, build towns with friends, collect Cobblemon, and shape your own adventure within the growing Helx Universe.

## IMPORTANT NOTES
1. Before launching, check the allocated memory. Do not keep it on the default 512MB.
2. When generating the world, use LARGE BIOMES.
3. Check your resource packs after loading in to see all of them are enabled.

## The Experience
CobbleHelx is designed to support different playstyles:
- building detailed towns and bases
- exploring and collecting Pokémon
- creating multiplayer communities
- hosting events with friends
- or simply enjoying a more atmospheric Minecraft experience

The modpack places a strong focus on decorative freedom and long-term worldbuilding, ideal for SMPs or forever worlds.

At the core you'll be focussing on:
- Creatures and Pets from:
  - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
  - [Adorable Hamster Pets](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorable-hamster-pets)
- Dimensions:
  - [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
  - [Deep and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- Armors from:
  - [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages)
  - [Fantasy Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_armor)
- Utility
  - [Icarus](https://modrinth.com/mod/icarus)
  - [HT's TreeChop](https://modrinth.com/mod/treechop)
  - [PokeNet (Cobblemon)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokenet-cobblemon)
  - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- Rewards from:
  - [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)
- World generation (using Large Biomes):
  - [WWOO](https://modrinth.com/datapack/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld-(datapack))
  - [WWOO Cliffs and Coves](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cliffs-and-coves)
  - [WWOO Navigable Rivers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navigable-rivers)
  - [WWOO Towering Tepuis](https://modrinth.com/datapack/towering-tepuis)
  - [The Roads More Travelled](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-roads-more-travelled) feature

The modpack includes [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and Shader support.
[Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shaderpack/complementary-reimagined) is included.

Full list of mods in your launcher or on the [versions page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblehelx/versions).

## For Server Admins
Configs/mods you should check/change to your liking on server side are:
- [CobbleDollars](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledollars)
- [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)
- [EasyNPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc-core) and the [Config UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc-config-ui)
- [OPAC](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)

## About Helx
Helx is the fictional universe created for projects by Two Way Europe, our non-profit organisation. It serves as the foundation for the stories, lore, regions, items, mechanics, and multiplayer experiences featured across our projects and related creations. [More info Two Way Europe can be found here](https://two-way.eu/).

## Known Issues
Some clash with the accessories mod, causing some cosmetics to act strange.
We're looking into it and will be solved in the next version.

## Planned Additions
The project is still actively growing. Planned additions include:
- more custom Helx content
- expanded decorative options
- additional gameplay systems
- deeper lore integration
- features like a future questing/progression book (planned, not yet implemented)
  
## License
The All Rights Reserved license applied to this modpack refers to all our lore, textures and original/unique ideas that are not common amongst other mods, modpacks or game mechanics. If you wish to adapt, edit or be **heavily** inspired by our Helx Universe, please contact us through the [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/vzDyspEMj4).

With love  
- SparkleCat
